---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for laravel-hoist
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Feature Description

What feature would you like to see in the package?

### Why Is This Needed?

Describe the problem this solves or the use case it enables. Is it related to feature discovery, attributes, metadata, tags, feature sets, Pennant integration, the facade, the make command, etc.?

### Suggested API / Implementation

If you have an idea of how this should look, share a code sketch.

```php
// e.g. proposed attribute, facade method, or Feature class shape
```

### Alternatives Considered

Are there workarounds you've tried, or alternative approaches you've ruled out?

### Backwards Compatibility

Would this change break existing API surface (the `Feature` contract, attributes, `FeatureData` shape, facade methods, config keys)?

### Additional Context

Add any relevant links, references, or related issues.
